name: Broiled Cheddar and Egg Salad Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Split and toast the buns or rolls, then spread butter on each.
2. In a large bowl, combine the chopped eggs, shredded cheddar cheese, green bell pepper, grated onion, evaporated milk, mustard, salt, and pepper.
3. Spread about 1/4 cup of the egg mixture onto each bun.
4. Broil the buns about 5 inches from the heat source until hot and the cheese is melted, approximately 5 minutes.
5. Serve hot.
